content.situation: 员工在前台拿了一个快递，想请前台帮忙送到自己的办公室
content.speakerText: Could you ______ this to my office? I'm in a meeting right now.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能把这送到我办公室吗？我现在在开会。
content.responseTemplate: Could you ______ this to my office? I'm in a meeting right now.
content.hint: 表示‘送到某处’的常用短语，常用于职场请求帮助
content.knowledgePoint: 高频请求表达：drop off + 物品 + to 地点

content.situation: 员工需要紧急把文件送到财务部，向前台求助
content.speakerText: This is urgent — could you ______ it to Finance? I'll owe you one.
content.speakerTextCn: 这个很紧急，你能把它送到财务部吗？我欠你一个人情。
content.responseTemplate: This is urgent — could you ______ it to Finance? I'll owe you one.
content.hint: 强调紧急时，表达‘亲自送过去’的地道说法
content.knowledgePoint: 紧急请求中的精准动词：hand-deliver

content.situation: 员工想请前台把包裹放在同事的工位上，但不确定对方是否方便
content.speakerText: Would you mind ______ this to Sarah's desk? No rush, just when you get a chance.
content.speakerTextCn: 你介意把这个放到莎拉的工位上吗？不急，你有空的时候就行。
content.responseTemplate: Would you mind ______ this to Sarah's desk? No rush, just when you get a chance.
content.hint: 用于礼貌请求时，'mind + 动名词'结构后接的动作需用动名词形式
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌请求结构：Would you mind + V-ing
